calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-14-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Plaintiff Sahil Wais Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Sahil Wais And His Counsel For $880.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Lindsay Lang;
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRIME TIME LIMOUSINES LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Sahil Wais Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Sahil Wais And His Counsel For $880.00.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Prime Trans Limousines, LLC's motion to compel verified responses to its form interrogatories, set one, is denied as moot. Plaintiff Sahil Wais has provided late verifications. The court does not award sanctions in light of the circumstances presented by plaintiff's counsel.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
